bead.title: metric: ddx metric list/show + fix metric.go:32 defs[0] bug + README cleanup
bead.description: Add ddx metric list and ddx metric show subcommands. Fix the existing defs[0] bug in cli/internal/metric/metric.go:32. README cleanup to reflect actual surface (and clarify that ddx metric run is a MET-ID convenience over ddx exec run).
bead.acceptance: 1. ddx metric list shows all MET-* artifacts. 2. ddx metric show <id> shows definition + recent history. 3. defs[0] bug fixed. 4. README accurate.
